title: XyTpa
description: A comprehensive teleportation mod for Minecraft with player teleportation, home management, death point recovery, and full multi-language support.
body:
# TPA Teleportation Mod

A comprehensive teleportation system for Minecraft multiplayer servers, featuring player-to-player teleportation, home management, and death point recovery with full multi-language support.

## ✨ Features

- **Player Teleportation**: `/tpa` and `/tpahere` commands with clickable buttons for easy acceptance/rejection
- **Home Management**: Set, teleport to, and manage multiple homes with configurable limits
- **Death Point Recovery**: Automatically records death locations with `/back` command
- **Multi-Language**: Supports English and Simplified Chinese, automatically switches based on client settings
- **Admin Tools**: Reload and save data with `/homeadmin` commands

## 🛠️ Technical Details

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.1
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric (Fabric API required)
- **Java Version**: 17+
- **Configuration**: JSON files stored in `config/tpamod/`

## 📖 Commands

- `/tpa <player>` - Request to teleport to player
- `/tpahere <player>` - Request player to teleport to you
- `/home [name]` - Teleport to your home
- `/sethome [name]` - Set a home location
- `/homes` - List all your homes
- `/back` - Return to death point
- `/tpahelp` - Show help menu

## ⚙️ Configuration

Edit `config/tpamod/tpa_config.json`:
- `maxHomesPerPlayer`: Set home limit (default: 5)
- `allowCrossWorld`: Enable/disable cross-world teleportation

## 🌍 Language Support

Automatically detects client language. Currently supports English (en_us) and Simplified Chinese (zh_cn). Easy to add more languages.

---

**Perfect for enhancing multiplayer server gameplay with reliable teleportation features!**
